series_metadata.series_description: Contains calibration data and chart records on all air pollution measuring devices and equipment.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Continually maintain and update microfilm in operating area ; Paper: Retain five years in operating area destroy data deemed not useful. Microfilm data deemed useful and destroy hardcopy after microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
